title: Ruyschia
taxonomy: Ruyschia is a genus of flowering plants that belong to the family Primulaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the primrose family. The genus Ruyschia is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the continent. Ruyschia is closely related to the genus Coris, which also belongs to the Primulaceae family. Within the family Primulaceae, Ruyschia is classified as part of the subfamily Theophrastoideae. The classification of Ruyschia reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Primulaceae family.
